evals.prompt: Is TinyLaunch worth submitting to for SEO backlinks? How does it compare?
evals.expected_output: Explains TinyLaunch offers dofollow backlinks at DR60-71, which is among the highest from directories. Notes free backlinks are conditional on Top 3 placement. Compares with Open Launch (DR65), DevHunt (DR57-62), MicroLaunch (DR59). Recommends $39 Premium for guaranteed backlink.

assertions.name: dr_value
assertions.description: States TinyLaunch DR is in the 60-71 range with dofollow backlink

assertions.name: conditional_free
assertions.description: Notes that free backlinks are conditional on Top 3 weekly placement

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares TinyLaunch with at least one other directory like Open Launch (DR65) or MicroLaunch (DR59)

evals.prompt: Should I pay $39 for TinyLaunch Premium or just submit for free?
evals.expected_output: Explains $39 Premium guarantees a dofollow backlink from DR60-71, skips queue, and places between 3rd and 4th. Compares with Open Launch Premium ($12 for DR65) and OpenHunts ($9.90 for DR50). Notes free tier requires Top 3 for backlink. Recommends Premium if backlink is the primary goal.

assertions.name: premium_features
assertions.description: Describes $39 Premium: guaranteed dofollow backlink, queue skip, placement between 3rd and 4th

assertions.name: free_tier_limitation
assertions.description: Notes free tier only gives backlinks to Top 3 weekly launches

assertions.name: alternatives
assertions.description: Compares with cheaper alternatives like Open Launch Premium ($12) or OpenHunts ($9.90)

evals.prompt: How do I submit my product to TinyLaunch and what should I prepare?
evals.expected_output: Walks through submission: create account, prepare materials (name, description, screenshots, working URL), choose free or $39 Premium, engage during launch week. Notes weekly launch cadence and Top 3 badge system.

assertions.name: submission_steps
assertions.description: Describes creating an account and submitting with product details and screenshots

assertions.name: free_vs_premium
assertions.description: Mentions the choice between free Standard and $39 Premium launch

assertions.name: weekly_cadence
assertions.description: Notes the weekly launch cycle and competition for Top 3 placement
